case_title: LINDSLEY ARCHITECTURAL LIGHTING VS. JUSTIN RINFRET MOORE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINDSLEY ARCHITECTURAL LIGHTING (SOLE PROPRIETOR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, JUSTIN RINFRET MOORE, DONALD A. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,655.00, SOLE PROPRIETORS ARE ALLOWED TO SUE FOR DAMAGES NOT EXCEEDING $10,000.00 IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LINDSLEY ARCHITECTURAL LIGHTING (SOLE PROPRIETOR) AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, JUSTIN RINFRET MOORE, DONALD A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINDSLEY ARCHITECTURAL LIGHTING (SOLE PROPRIETOR)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF LINDSLEY ARCHITECTURAL LIGHTING IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ALAN LINDSLEY, OWNER. DEFENDANT JUSTIN RINFRET IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DONALD MOORE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
